title: Sales Enablement Specialist
description:
Are you motivated to participate in a dynamic, multi\-tasking environment? Do you want to join a company that invests in its employees? Are you seeking a position where you can use your skills while continuing to be challenged and learn? Then we encourage you to dive deeper into this opportunity.

We believe in career development and empowering our employees. Not only do we provide career coaches internally, but we offer many training opportunities to expand your knowledge base! We have highly competitive benefits with a variety of HMO and PPO options. We have company 401k match along with an Employee Stock Purchase Program. We have tuition reimbursement, leadership development, and even start employees off with 16 days of paid time off plus holidays. We offer wellness courses and have highly engaged employee resource groups. Come join the Neo team and be part of our amazing World Class Culture!**NeoGenomics is looking for Sales Enablement Specialist** **who wants to continue to learn in order to allow our company to grow.****Now that you know what we're looking for in talent, let us tell you why you'd want to work at NeoGenomics:** As an employer, we promise to provide you with a purpose\-driven mission in which you have the opportunity to save lives by improving patient care through the exceptional work you perform. Together, we will become the world's leading cancer reference laboratory.
**Position Summary:**
The Sales Enablement Specialist will be responsible for developing processes for prospecting and cultivating new business opportunities via lead generation activities. Additional responsibilities include training additional team members, therapeutic pipeline analysis to determine alignment with our offerings, targeted email campaigns, scheduling appointments through contact software application, and evaluating external leads to determine viability. Success is measured through the ability to help drive sales opportunities and promote revenue growth.
**Core Responsibilities:*** Develop internal processes for developing sales leads for the commercial team, evaluating leads from external sources, and develop tracking mechanisms for lead to contract close success rate.
* Train new Sales Development team members as needed.
* Work within BioMedTracker to evaluate clinical trial pipelines and determine needs relating to the NeoGenomics test offerings.
* Leverage the Apollo contact database to cultivate contact information and send offering campaign emails.
* Operationalize innovative outbound lead generation via channels including cold calling, email campaigns, networking events, and industry conferences to accounts and prospects, with support from Scientific Affairs and Marketing
* Assist Pharma sales team in providing technical and administrative product information
* Research and identify key decision\-makers and stakeholders within target accounts, and effectively engage them to understand their clinical research needs
* Plan and implement projects that support the Pharma sales organization
* Serve as first point of contact for inbound leads, and coordinate with the Pharma sales team to ensure leads are nurtured, qualified, and converted to live opportunities
* Partner closely with Scientific Affairs, Marketing and other cross\-functional teams to develop tailored solutions and proposals that address clients’ specific requirements
* Together with the broader marketing team, support the development of scalable marketing and sales development processes and systems
* Initiate CDA and NDA processes with new clients
* Initiate and follow RFP processes with new and existing clients with support from cross\-functional teams
* Coordinate with Pharma sales teams to provide sales documentation and satisfy customer requirements
* Collaborate closely with Product Marketing on content distribution, total available market analysis and optimization strategies
* Maintain accurate and up\-to\-date records of all sales activities, client interactions, and opportunities using CRM software
* May support the Commercial Enablement team, where applicable
* Manage external software database relationships and contract renewal timing


**Experience, Education and Qualifications:*** Bachelor’s degree required
* 1\+ years’ experience required
* Demonstrated interest in marketing, sales and/or operations
* Exceptional and professional communication skills – written, verbal and presentation coupled with excellent listening skills
* Ability to develop rapport, influence others and maintain strong working relationships at all levels
* Experience using social media platforms
* Analytical thinker who takes a structured data\-driven approach to problem solving
* Intellectually curious individual eager to learn the industry, the product, and each customer’s business
* Highly organized individual capable of tracking dozens of leads simultaneously and ensure systematic follow up and responsiveness to client requests
* Able to operate efficiently in an environment of ambiguity
* Familiarity with common sales automation tools like Apollo, BioMedTracker, Trial Trove, , Salesforce, and LinkedIn preferred

title: Sales Enablement Specialist
description:
**ABOUT THE** **COMPANY****:**



Bluebird Fiber is a premier fiber telecommunications provider of internet, data transport, and other services to carriers, businesses, schools, hospitals, and other enterprises in the Midwest. To learn more, please visit bluebirdfiber.com.



Join an amazing team of telecommunication professionals! Bluebird is a dynamic growing company in need of a Sales Enablement Specialist to be a part of a collaborative team. This is a full\-time, Hybrid schedule position eligible for our full benefits package, including medical, dental, vision, 401k with a company match, PTO, and more. All of us at Bluebird work hard to meet objectives for the organization and live the mission and values of this growing company to meet a common goal. Check out this video that highlights our amazing company culture.


**Position Summary:**



Bluebird Fiber is seeking a sharp, sales\-minded Sales Enablement Specialist who loves turning complex ideas into content and tools that help sellers win. This role is for someone who thinks like a marketer, understands how B2B sales actually closes deals, and wants to own the enablement and content engine that powers a high\-growth fiber business.



Reporting to our Manager of Marketing \& Sales Enablement, you’ll be a critical partner to our Enterprise, Channel, and Carrier sales organizations, producing the sales collateral, battlecards, pitch decks, case studies, and blog content that move prospects down the funnel and help our reps close. Your work will live at the intersection of marketing and revenue.



Bluebird Fiber operates one of the most extensive business\-only fiber networks in the Midwest, serving enterprise and carrier customers across the region. We’re in a high\-growth chapter — expanding our footprint, scaling our sales efforts, and investing in the functions that directly connect to revenue. Our marketing team is small, but talented, and empowered to drive real outcomes.



If you want to own a function, not just contribute to one, and you’re energized by the idea of building a sales enablement and content engine from a strong foundation, then this role is for you.


To succeed in this role, you’ll need to be an excellent writer with a sharp editorial eye, and someone who genuinely understands how B2B sales works. You’ll partner with sellers, product leaders, and cross\-functional stakeholders.


**Requirements:**


* Degree in Marketing, Journalism, Communications, English, Business, or a related field


* 2–4 years of experience in B2B sales enablement, content marketing, communications, or copywriting


* Excellent written and verbal communication skills with a sharp editorial eye


* Proven ability to write across formats (long\-form, short\-form, sales\-facing, brand\-facing)


* Strong project management skills and the ability to juggle multiple deadlines


* Comfortable partnering with sales leaders and subject matter experts to build content that lands


* Basic knowledge of Microsoft 365 applications, including PowerPoint, Word, and Excel

  


**Preferred Qualifications:**


* Prior experience producing B2B case studies, whitepapers, or solution content


* Experience building sales enablement collateral (one\-pagers, battlecards, pitch decks)


* Familiarity with Salesforce, Act\-On (or comparable marketing automation platforms), and content management systems such as WordPress


* Prior experience in technology — telecom or fiber experience is a plus


* Comfortable using Microsoft Copilot to accelerate content production while maintaining quality and brand voice

**What you’ll be doing:**



As Sales Enablement Specialist, you will own the content and sales\-facing enablement materials that support revenue across the business. You’ll collaborate closely with the Manager of Marketing \& Sales Enablement and the rest of the marketing team to deliver integrated campaigns, enablement programs, and content that supports the full funnel.



Your key responsibilities will include:


* **Sales Enablement –** Partner with Enterprise, Channel, and Carrier sales teams to build and maintain a library of sales collateral: one\-pagers, pitch decks, battlecards, product sheets, and QBR templates. Manage enablement programs that help sellers ramp faster and close more deals.


* **Content Marketing –** Develop and maintain an editorial calendar of blog posts, case studies, whitepapers, solution briefs, and thought leadership content. Own long\-form writing across the business and partner with subject matter experts to translate technical capability into compelling story.


* **Copywriting –** Write high\-converting copy for email campaigns, paid ads, landing pages, and integrated campaign messaging. Support social media copywriting in partnership with our social lead.


* **Internal \& Channel Communications –** Produce our quarterly partner newsletter, internal company communications, and sales team updates. Support press release drafting and corporate communications as needed.


* **Campaign Content –** Develop messaging and content assets for integrated marketing campaigns, product launches, and event pull\-through. Maintain brand voice consistency across all written touchpoints.

title: B2B eCommerce and AI Enablement Leader
description:
Job Description Summary
  

Dematic is looking for a strategic and visionary leader to spearhead the integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) with a Business\-to\-Business (B2B) eCommerce platform to drive transformative growth and operational efficiency in the Lifecycle Solutions \& Services (LSS)– Spare Parts and Repairs P\&L. The B2B eCommerce and AI Enablement Leader is the liaison between Dematic’s customers, the LSS parts organization, and IT business and development partners to drive market adaptation of our ecommerce and digital platforms, with a primary focus on revenue generation and an improved customer experience. The successful candidate has functional experience in the business aspect of B2B digital marketing, eCommerce and Artificial Intelligence with a proficient technical background and strong focus on customer experience.
**We offer:**
=============

* **Career Development**
* **Competitive Compensation and Benefits**
* **Pay Transparency**
* **Global Opportunities**

  



*Dematic provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.*

*This policy applies to all terms and conditions of employment, including recruiting, hiring, placement, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, transfer, leaves of absence, compensation and training.*

*The base pay range for this role is estimated to be $124k to $182k salary at the time of posting. Final compensation will be determined by various factors such as work location, education, experience, knowledge, and skills.*

**Tasks and Qualifications:**
=============================

Dematic seeks a forward\-thinking leader to lead AI integration in B2B eCommerce, enhancing growth and efficiency. The role involves bridging customers, LSS, and IT partners to boost revenue and customer satisfaction.


**What You Will Do in This Role**
---------------------------------

* Formulate and put into action an elaborate B2B eCommerce and AI blueprint: Explore opportunities for incorporating AI to enhance online sales, customer engagement, and operational effectiveness in the B2B realm.
* Take charge of the digital revolution in B2B commerce by supervising the incorporation of AI solutions in the B2B eCommerce environment, including online product selection, quoting, order management, and customer service.
* Elevate customer satisfaction: Implement AI to personalize product recommendations, streamline the buying process, and offer customized parts choices for individual B2B clients.
* Improve operations: Deploy predictive analytics for inventory management, demand forecasting, and intelligent order routing to improve efficiency and reduce costs.
* Drive profitable business growth: Leverage AI to identify upselling and cross\-selling opportunities, optimize pricing strategies, and shorten the quote\-to\-cash process.
* Taking charge of data and technology requirements: Gather and rank needs for technology and data. Collaborate with development teams to launch products. Guarantee smooth integration of AI solutions with current B2B systems such as ERP, CRM, and warehouse management systems.
* Develop and manage a successful team: Recruit, support, and grow a team of eCommerce and AI enthusiasts, promoting a culture of ingenuity and partnership.
* Guide Dematic to excel by managing AI and eCommerce tech, analyzing impacts, and proposing strategies for a competitive edge.

**What We are Looking For**
---------------------------

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in a relevant field like Business, Marketing, Computer Science, or a related subject area, or equivalent experience.
* Proven experience in B2B eCommerce management and strategy, 5\+ years preferred.
* SAP S/4HANA Order\-to\-Cash (OTC) and Procure\-to\-Pay (P2P) preferred.
* Familiarity with the material handling sector is advantageous.
* Profound grasp of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning principles and implementations within the B2B realm.
* Proven record of driving digital transformation initiatives with measurable business outcomes.
* Strong analytical and data\-driven decision\-making skills.
* Impressive leadership, communication, and teamwork capabilities in managing teams efficiently and engaging with partners from diverse departments.
* Familiarity with B2B eCommerce platforms and related technologies.
* Travel as per business needs, estimated up to 30% of the time.

title: Senior Consultant, Portfolio Enablement Lead
description:
The Portfolio Enablement Lead is a senior individual contributor responsible for enabling disciplined execution, transparency, and decision\-making across a complex technology and business portfolio. This role partners closely with IT and business leaders to ensure strategic initiatives are well\-structured, prioritized, and executed effectively—without direct people management responsibility.

  

The role acts as a force multiplier for the VP and leadership team by driving portfolio rigor, improving operating cadence, and ensuring that strategy translates into actionable plans and measurable outcomes.  

  

**Responsibilities**

**Portfolio \& Financial Management (Budget \+ Forecasting)**

* Own and run Biopharma Solutions IT budget planning and management processes, including annual planning, in\-year forecasting, variance tracking, and leadership\-ready rollups.
* Partner with Finance and portfolio leaders to ensure timely, accurate inputs into enterprise financial processes and templates.
* Build a consistent operating view of portfolio spend and capacity, highlighting risks, tradeoffs, and decision points.

**SFP Enablement Across All 3 Areas of Your Org**

* Coordinate Strategic \& Financial Planning (SFP) activities across the three areas in your organization: timeline management, artifact readiness, stakeholder alignment, and submission quality control.
* Drive consolidation of assumptions, dependencies, and narrative across SFP inputs to ensure a cohesive story and “exec\-ready” documentation.
* Maintain an SFP artifact repository and reusable templates (business case slide, FAQ inputs, investment narratives).

**Run Operational Reviews (Operating Rhythm \+ Performance)**

* Plan, organize, and facilitate monthly/quarterly Operational Reviews (agenda, pre\-reads, dashboards, decision capture, actions).
* Standardize content quality and performance reporting across teams (KPIs, highlights, risks/asks, and follow\-ups).
* Track action items to closure and ensure owners/next steps are clear.

**Organize \& Facilitate Product Reviews**

* Own logistics and facilitation for bi\-annual/quarterly Product Reviews: scheduling, stakeholder prep, content governance, pre\-reads, and meeting flow.
* Ensure product teams provide consistent updates on: outcomes/value, roadmap progress, financials, risks, and decisions required.
* Drive post\-review follow\-through and action tracking.

**Lead the AI Champions Program (Biopharma Solutions IT)**

* Own the AI Champions community model for Biopharma Solutions IT: charter, membership, expectations, and operating cadence.
* Equip champions to identify high\-impact use cases, promote AI literacy, and publish wins to normalize AI\-enhanced workflows.
* Partner with enterprise AI governance and leaders to reinforce responsible AI use and alignment with AI standards/policies.

**People Manager Forum \+ Engagement Leadership**

* Design and run a Quarterly People Managers Forum: content agenda, leadership enablement topics, cross\-team sharing, and follow\-ups.
* Lead engagement activities for Biopharma Solutions IT (recognition moments, pulse feedback loops, community building, development programming).

**Qualifications**

* 8\-12 years of experience, preferred
* Bachelor's degree in related field, or equivalent work experience, preferred
* Experience in portfolio operations, PMO, finance operations, strategy ops, or transformation roles
* Experience building communities of practice / champions programs and leading adoption initiatives
* Familiarity with responsible AI governance concepts and cross\-functional operating models

 **What is expected of you and others at this level**

* Applies advanced knowledge and understanding of concepts, principles, and technical capabilities to manage a wide variety of projects
* Participates in the development of policies and procedures to achieve specific goals
* Recommends new practices, processes, metrics, or models
* Works on or may lead complex projects of large scope
* Projects may have significant and long\-term impact
* Provides solutions which may set precedent
* Independently determines method for completion of new projects
* Receives guidance on overall project objectives
* Acts as a mentor to less experienced colleagues

title: Sales Enablement Specialist- GTM Onboarding
description:
Overview:

As a GTM Onboarding Specialist, you will own the end\-to\-end new hire onboarding experience for our BDR, Sales, and Customer Success teams. You will design, coordinate, and deliver role\-based onboarding that ramps new team members quickly and consistently on our products, processes, tools, and go\-to
market motions.  

You will collaborate closely with Sales, BDR Leadership, Customer Success, Pre\-Sales, Support, Product, and Marketing to ensure new hires are ready to have high\-quality customer conversations and execute effectively in their roles. You will also work with our LMS vendor to operationalize all GTM onboarding programs, including scheduling, invitations, assignments, and performance tracking.
Responsibilities:
**What You'll Be Doing**  

* Own new hire GTM onboarding for BDR, Sales, and Customer Success, from program design through delivery, measurement, and continuous improvement in partnership with SEM (Sales Enablement Managers)
* Design structured onboarding journeys (30/60/90\+ days) that combine live sessions, e\-learning, on\-the\-job activities, and certifications for each GTM role.
* Coordinate onboarding cohorts: build calendars, schedule sessions, manage invites, and communicate expectations to new hires and their leaders.
* Manage the LMS for GTM onboarding:
* + Build and maintain curricula, learning paths, and assignments.
	+ Enroll learners, track completion, and report on progress and scores.
	+ Partner with the vendor to address issues and optimize workflows.
* Facilitate live training sessions for new hires on:
* + Company, market, and buyer landscape
	+ Our products and value propositions
	+ Sales/CS processes, tools, and methodologies
	+ Role\-specific skills (prospecting, discovery, customer engagement, renewals, expansion, etc.).
* Develop and maintain onboarding content and tools, including playbooks, role guides, battlecards, talk tracks, and checklists used in the first 90 days.
* Partner with GTM leaders (BDR, Sales, Customer Success, Pre\-Sales) to:
* + Clarify ramp expectations and success metrics.
	+ Align onboarding content to current goals, plays, and initiatives.
	+ Ensure managers are equipped to coach and reinforce post\-onboarding.
* Measure onboarding effectiveness using clear KPIs, such as time\-to\-first\-meeting, time\-to\-first\-opportunity, time\-to\-first book\-of\-business, certification pass rates, and new hire satisfaction.
* Gather feedback from new hires and leaders and use it to iterate and improve the onboarding experience on a regular cadence.
* Support transition and upskilling programs (e.g., BDR to AE, AE to Strategic, CSM role changes) with targeted “bridge” training and learning plans.
* Ensure strong tool and process adoption by embedding training on CRM, sales engagement tools, call intelligence, and customer success platforms into the onboarding journey.
* Stay current on GTM and onboarding best practices, as well as industry and competitive trends, and incorporate them into our programs.
* Support broader GTM enablement initiatives as needed, while maintaining primary ownership of the new hire onboarding experience.


This job description in no way implies that the duties listed here are the only ones that team members can be required to perform.


Qualifications:
**What You Bring to the Team*** Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Education, or a related field, or equivalent experience.
* 3\+ years of experience in Sales Enablement, GTM onboarding, Sales Operations, Customer Success Enablement, or L\&D within a fast\-paced, high\-growth environment.
* Demonstrated experience designing and running new hire onboarding programs for BDR/Sales/CS or similar GTM audiences.
* Strong understanding of B2B sales and customer success processes, methodologies, and best practices.
* Proven ability to create engaging, scalable training (live and self\-paced) that accelerates time\-to\-ramp and revenue impact.
* Excellent facilitation and communication skills, with confidence leading cohorts of new hires and collaborating with senior GTM leaders.
* Experience working with LMS platforms (building curriculum, assigning courses, pulling reports) and sales/CS tech stacks (CRM, sales engagement, call recording, CS platforms).
* Data\-driven mindset with the ability to define, track, and act on onboarding KPIs and program feedback.
* Highly organized and detail\-oriented, able to manage multiple cohorts, programs, and stakeholders simultaneously.
* Self\-motivated and adaptable, comfortable operating in a dynamic, rapidly changing GTM environment.
* Strong stakeholder management and coaching skills, with the ability to influence and align cross\-functional teams.
* Knowledge of the Preconstruction market and competitive landscape is a plus but not required.

 **Physical Demands and Work Environment**  

* The physical activities of this position include frequent sitting, telephone communication, and working on a computer for extended periods. Visual acuity is required to perform activities close to the eyes.
* Team members are expected to maintain a dedicated and ergonomically appropriate workspace.
* Team members who live within commuting distance of one of our office locations (Greater Cincinnati/Northern Kentucky or Atlanta, Georgia) are expected to work in a **hybrid capacity**, with regular in\-office presence every Tuesday and Wednesday each week.
* All team members must reside and perform their work within the United States.

 **E\-Verify Statement**  

ConstructConnect utilizes the E\-Verify program with every potential new hire. This makes it possible for us to make certain that every employee who works for ConstructConnect is eligible to work in the United States. To learn more about E\-Verify you can call 1\-800\-255\-7688 or visit their website. E\-Verify® is a registered trademark of the United States Department of Homeland Security.
